content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff origin/master..HEAD`, read the changed implementation in `src/adapters/process_backend.rs` and the related test/scenario updates, and ran `cargo test process_backend --lib -- --nocapture` plus `cargo test process_backend_test -- --nocapture`. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the submitted changes.

## Amendments

None.
